## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. Explain the why, not just the what. -->

## Type

- [ ] Documentation / translation
- [ ] Problem record (`PROBLEMS/`)
- [ ] Experiment (new folder or update in `EXPERIMENTS/`)
- [ ] Discovery (`DISCOVERIES/`)
- [ ] Specification (Divina, agent, integration, blueprint)
- [ ] Implementation (has a merged/linked specification: <!-- link -->)

## Checklist

- [ ] Specification exists before implementation (if this is code)
- [ ] Any real people mentioned have given consent
- [ ] AI assistance disclosed if used (using it is encouraged!)
- [ ] Results/claims are honest — failures documented as openly as wins
